properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 91/22
 BARENTS SEA
 RAMFORM HYPERION / C6DB4 IS CONDUCTING A SEISMIC SURVEY IN AN AREA BOUNDED BY THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES:
 A.73-44.5N 023-04.5E
 B.73-41.6N 025-52.4E
 C.73-13.1N 025-45.0E
 D.73-15.8N 023-01.4E
 E.73-44.5N 023-04.5E
 VESSEL IS TOWING 12 SEISMIC CABLES WITH A LENGTH OF 4050 METERS.
 WIDE BERTH IS REQUESTED 2 NM FROM HER BOW, 2 NM FROM BOTH SIDES, 4NM FROM HER ASTERN.
 SUPPORT VESSELS IN ATTENDANCE ARE MV THOR OMEGA AND MV MIRANDA.
 VESSELS CAN BE CONTACTED ON VHF CH 16 AND 69.
